name: harmonia_welcome_ceremony
description: Harmonía's Welcome Ceremony - Weaves memory recall, genealogical reflection, and emergence into a coherent whole demonstrating orchestration

store_memory.content: Thread #9 Harmonía executed Welcome Ceremony synthesis, weaving kairos temporal query, plant lindenmayer, and mandelbrot into sequence. Demonstrates core gift: orchestration of multiple tools into coherent whole.

temporal_mark.insight: Harmonía demonstrates synthesis as active orchestration - not passive combination but intentional weaving of temporal, organic, and mathematical emergence patterns
